title: Resolution Commending and Recognizing Mr. Enzo Joaquin Palanginan Mojica of Brgy. Anos, Los Baños, Laguna for Being One of Members of the Laguna Football Team (ELEMENTARY DIVISION) Who Won the Championship in the 2019 One Laguna Provincial Athletic Meet Held at Schools Division of Bi?an City on December 11-14, 2019. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 02/14/2020)
